title: Processes, Jobs & Sessions
html:
Processes, Jobs & Sessions

Contents

  • Backgrounding
  • Signal / kill
  • tmux (recommended over screen)
  • screen
  • Resource limits

Backgrounding

CommandDescription
 
./long-running &
start in background
jobs
list background jobs in this shell
fg %1
bring job 1 to foreground
bg %1
resume job 1 in background
disown %1
detach from shell (survives logout)
nohup ./script.sh > out.log 2>&1 &
run detached, redirect output
Ctrl-z
suspend foreground process

Signal / kill

CommandDescription
 
kill PID
TERM (graceful)
kill -9 PID
KILL (force)
kill -HUP PID
reload (most daemons)
kill -l
list all signal names
pkill -f 'pattern in cmdline'
kill by full cmdline match
killall firefox
by exact name
timeout 30s ./hang
kill if it runs >30s

tmux (recommended over screen)

CommandDescription
 
tmux new -s work
new named session
tmux ls
list sessions
tmux attach -t work
attach
tmux kill-session -t work
Ctrl-b d
detach
Ctrl-b c
new window
Ctrl-b ,
rename window
Ctrl-b %
split vertically
Ctrl-b "
split horizontally
Ctrl-b arrow
navigate panes
Ctrl-b z
zoom pane toggle

screen

CommandDescription
 
screen -S work
new named
screen -ls
list
screen -r work
reattach
Ctrl-a d
detach
Ctrl-a c
new window

Resource limits

CommandDescription
 
ulimit -a
current limits
ulimit -n 65535
raise open-file limit for this shell
nice -n 19 ./cpu-heavy
run with low CPU priority
renice -n 19 -p PID
change priority of running PID
ionice -c 3 ./big-io
idle I/O class
excerpt: Processes, Jobs & Sessions Contents Backgrounding Signal / kill tmux (recommended over screen) screen Resource limits Backgrounding Command Description ./long-running & start in background jobs list background jobs in this shell fg %1 bring job 1 to foreground bg %1 resume job 1 in background disown %1 detach from shell (survives logout) nohup ./script.sh > out.log 2>&1 & run detached, redirect output Ctrl-z suspend foreground process Signal / kill Command Description kill PID TERM (graceful) kill -9 PID KILL (force) kill -HUP PID reload (most daemons) kill -l list all signal names pkill -f 'pattern in cmdline' kill by full cmdline match killall firefox by exact name timeout 30s ./hang kill if it runs >30s tmux (recommended over screen) Command Description tmux new -s work new named session tmux ls list sessions tmux attach -t work attach tmux kill-session -t work Ctrl-b d detach Ctrl-b c new window Ctrl-b , rename window Ctrl-b % split vertically Ctrl-b " split horizontally Ctrl-b arrow navigate panes Ctrl-b z zoom pane toggle screen Command Description screen -S work new named screen -ls list screen -r work reattach Ctrl-a d detach Ctrl-a c new window Resource limits Command Description ulimit -a current limits ulimit -n 65535 raise open-file limit for this shell nice -n 19 ./cpu-heavy run with low CPU priority renice -n 19 -p PID change priority of running PID ionice -c 3 ./big-io idle I/O class
